overall_caveats: Concord-only sources must not be treated as countywide.
No source is marked time-safe for historical training in Phase 13A.
Countywide small-area plan/future land use GIS outside Concord is still missing.
WSACC utility capacity/service-area GIS is still missing.
Local planned road projects beyond STIP are still missing.
recommended_next_ingestion_phase: Phase 13B should ingest one bounded source at a time, starting with Concord future land use overlay or STIP project proximity, while preserving jurisdiction/current-context caveats.

caveats: Does not replace countywide small-area plan or countywide future land use GIS.
Do not treat as countywide land-use context.
sources.recommended_ingestion_phase: Phase 13B Concord future land-use overlay prototype
sources.source_name: City of Concord Land Use Plan 2030

caveats: Does not include every local concept road, small intersection improvement, or plan-only local project.
Should be spatially filtered to Cabarrus County during future ingestion.
Not time-safe for historical model training unless project availability/adoption dates are aligned to snapshot years.
Current station context unless historical AADT by year is available later.
Station proximity is a traffic-intensity proxy, not parcel-specific driveway traffic.
sources.recommended_ingestion_phase: Phase 13D AADT station proximity and traffic-intensity features

caveats: Does not replace countywide official rezoning approval history.
Case records should not be interpreted as final approvals without status/date field review.
sources.recommended_ingestion_phase: Phase 13E Concord planning-case proximity and activity features
